programme.desc: Molly Mole is digging in the garden with Peppa, George and Freddy Fox when she finds buried treasure

programme.title: Milkshake! Bop Box Boogie
programme.desc: Specially composed and choreographed songs inspired by swimming, with the presenters teaching the audience the moves and then encouraging them to dance along with them

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Mrs Bird takes Paddington on a monster hunt

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder, Chase and Rubble devise a plan to help some sea turtle hatchlings safely cross the road to get to the beach

programme.title: Ricky Zoom
programme.desc: Scootio programs her Scootbops to perform repairs just like Maxwell. But when they think they can do a better job, things start to go wrong

programme.title: Pirata & Capitano
programme.desc: Hippo-the-Wise enters a mysterious underwater cave to see why a Gooza is acting so strangely

programme.title: Milkshake! Monkey's Amazing Adventures
programme.desc: The character goes through a tunnel under the biggest reservoir in the UK. Expert Gary explains how useful reservoirs are, and the Milkshakers try to build their very own dam

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Daddy Pig gives Mummy Pig a card. However, the post hasn't arrived yet with Mummy's card to Daddy still to arrive

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: It is a nice sunny day, and Hopper wants to play - but all Big Boo wants to do is sleep

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents face a raft of excuses and stalling tactics as they try to recover £3,000 from a young debtor in Manchester, and a Kent businessman tries to protect his company from his ex-wife by claiming that it belongs to his sister. A Staffordshire optician who owes money to a supplier claims that the equipment he was sold was faulty, while enforcement agents in north London are forced to mediate between a tenant who claims she is being evicted for having children and a landlord who says she wanted to leave in the hope of getting a council house

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Build a New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke helps a Buckinghamshire couple escape their demanding jobs and relocate to Scotland, where they intend to modernise a 120-year-old farmhouse with their own designs. Businesswoman Carol becomes project manager and aims to be settled before Christmas, but bad weather and delayed planning permission put the date back, forcing the family to spend more time apart

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ari heads home to delivers the news that he found Dean, while Irene persuades Jasmine to visit Colby in jail. Roo reveals the news about the arrival of her half-brother

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Hendrix is devastated by the split with Harlow, while Jay is surprised to realise Mack might have feelings for him. Dipi and Amy end up in a lip-synch battle against each other

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Dating Is Murder (2017)
programme.desc: The sleuthing therapist investigates a series of unsolved missing persons cases. She discovers that all the people who have disappeared are connected by a dating app, leading her to uncover the darker side of online romance. The third film in the murder mystery series, starring Kellie Martin and Giacomo Baessato

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall comes to the aid of more dog owners at their wits' end dealing with their four-legged friends. He helps a woman teach a determined Doberman to obey not just her but her elderly parents as well, reunites two dachshunds who have gone from the best of friends to the worst of enemies, and tries to calm the ardour of a hairdresser's French bulldog

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Hendrix is devastated by the split with Harlow, while Jay is surprised to realise Mack might have feelings for him. Dipi and Amy end up in a lip-synch battle against each other

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ari heads home to delivers the news that he found Dean, while Irene persuades Jasmine to visit Colby in jail. Roo reveals the news about the arrival of her half-brother

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: The Highland Vet
programme.desc: Equine vet Tom is called back to the family farm when his wife Scye becomes worried about their Shetland pony Vaila, and he is concerned it might be suffering from a potentially fatal condition called laminitis. Guy has an urgent case on his hands when an 11-month-old Chihuahua arrives at the practice under the weather and heavily pregnant

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall helps Paul and Yvonne, whose Border Collie will not let them leave the house without a marathon bout of barking, while every phone call also sets the dog off. Graeme also meets a Labrador that becomes aggressive when there is food around, and a husky with a fear of stairs

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben revisits Amanda Owen and her family at their remote farm of Ravenseat in the Yorkshire Dales, who have gone on to star in Our Yorkshire Farm since he first met them. Ben discovers how they get by in the tough world of farming and meeting the latest addition to their flock

programme.title: A Country Life for Half the Price with Kate Humble
programme.desc: Kate meets a family from Essex who have bought four acres of woodland in Suffolk to escape the growing development and noise pollution of their Rochford home. They plan to develop bird photography and beekeeping businesses, while a vegetable garden offers the opportunity to become completely self-sufficient

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Documentary examining the most famous and feared criminal court in the land, and some of the cases that have been tried there, including Doctor Crippen and John Christie. The history of the building itself is also assessed, from the creation of the first Old Bailey in 1539 to its iconic facelift in 1907

programme.title: The Butcher Surgeon: Why Wasn't He Stopped?
programme.desc: Documentary profiling former breast surgeon Ian Paterson, who was recently convicted of intentionally wounding patients by performing needless operations for more than a decade. Paterson was found guilty on 17 counts, and this programme examines how was he able to continue for so long, asking whether his employers might have ignored or failed to act on a series of warnings stretching back to 2003. Some of Paterson's victims are also interviewed, along with health service whistleblowers

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Eamonn & Ruth: How the Other Half Lives
programme.desc: Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford head to Moscow to infiltrate the exclusive world of billionaire oligarchs. They meet the son of one of Russia's wealthiest men, as well as the owner of an exclusive department store in the city, and learn about the whims of the Russian elite

programme.title: Now That's Funny!
programme.desc: A collection of internet-sourced videos with a family friendly hook, featuring people who crash weddings, sporting fails and flops, and unique science experiments. Plus, the Slow Motion Theatre and the Stars of the Week awards

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: A fox cub shows symptoms of a life-threatening condition, and a young badger reacts badly to goat's milk

programme.title: House Busters
programme.desc: Janet Ellis and her team of new-age practitioners suggest ways in which changes to homes could positively affect the lives of their owners

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice helps a chauffeur and his girlfriend spruce up their neglected seaside bungalow in Clacton-on-Sea, Essex, to make it more attractive to potential buyers, transforming the interior and landscaping the overgrown gardens. Presented by Alistair Appleton

programme.title: The Perfect Catch (2005)
programme.desc: Unlikely couple Ben and Lindsey meet and fall in love over the winter. When summer brings a new baseball season, Lindsey discovers Ben's devotion to the Boston Red Sox baseball team knows no bounds - and suspects she will always come second. The Farrelly brothers' romantic comedy, starring Jimmy Fallon and Drew Barrymore, inspired by Nick Hornby's football-themed novel Fever Pitch, but with America's favourite sport replacing Britain's

programme.title: Baggage Claim (2013)
programme.desc: An air hostess is horrified at the thought of her younger sister getting married while she is still single. She realises her job gives her access to eligible men from across America, and begins clocking up thousands of air miles as she scours the country for a potential fiance. Romantic comedy, with Paula Patton and Taye Diggs

programme.title: Gentlemen Prefer Blondes (1953)
programme.desc: Lounge singers Lorelei and Dorothy embark on a transatlantic cruise to Paris in search of rich husbands. While Dorothy falls for a penniless man, Lorelei thinks she has found the millionaire of her dreams, only for his father to hire a private eye to spy on her and prove she is a gold-digger. Howard Hawks' musical comedy, starring Marilyn Monroe, Jane Russell, Charles Coburn and Elliott Reid

programme.title: A Room with a View (1985)
programme.desc: A naive woman accompanies an older cousin on a trip to Florence, where she falls in love with a forward-thinking man. She is forced to cut short the romance and return to a loveless engagement in England, where the object of her affection makes an unexpected appearance. Period drama from James Ivory, based on EM Forster's novel and starring Helena Bonham Carter, Maggie Smith, Denholm Elliott, Daniel Day-Lewis, Julian Sands and Judi Dench

programme.title: Table 19 (2017)
programme.desc: Dumped by the best man via text, a former maid of honour decides to pitch up at her friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself relegated to table 19, where her tablemates include a nanny, an openly warring married couple, a teenager seeking a date and a gangly Englishman who's clearly hiding a secret. Comedy, starring Anna Kendrick, Craig Robinson, Lisa Kudrow and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Love, Simon (2018)
programme.desc: Coming-of-age comedy drama about a secretly gay high-school student who begins to fall for an anonymous classmate after exchanging emails with the boy, known as 'Blue'. While trying to discover Blue's identity, Simon must also find himself. Starring Nick Robinson, Jennifer Garner and Josh Duhamel

programme.title: Mr & Mrs Smith (2005)
programme.desc: An outwardly bored suburban couple lead double lives as professional assassins, both unaware of their partner's secret. When they are hired to kill each other, the deadly situation puts some much-needed excitement back into their stale relationship. Comedy adventure, starring Brad Pitt, Angelina Jolie, Vince Vaughn and Adam Brody

programme.title: A Fantastic Woman (2017)
programme.desc: Marina, a transgender woman who works as a waitress and moonlights as a nightclub singer, is bowled over by the death of her older boyfriend. Drama, starring Daniela Vega, Francisco Reyes and Luis Gnecco. In Spanish

programme.title: Found
programme.desc: Three Deaf people explain how falling in love helped them discover Deaf culture, Deaf identity and BSL

programme.title: Winchester '73 (1950)
programme.desc: A gunslinger tracks down his father's killer, but is unable to exact his revenge because the sheriff of the town makes a point of confiscating all firearms. Instead he challenges him to compete in a shooting competition to win a superb rifle, but when the murderer loses, he steals the coveted prize. Western, starring James Stewart, Shelley Winters, Dan Duryea and Stephen McNally

programme.title: OSS (1946)
programme.desc: Alan Ladd is on fine form as a tough spy sent to France to collect vital information shortly before D-Day. His team of expert operatives includes a strong-minded female agent - but sparks fly when the pair begin to work together, a situation which looks likely to lead to a crisis of conscience. By-the-numbers World War Two adventure, with Geraldine Fitzgerald, Patric Knowles and Richard Benedict

programme.title: The Gentle Sex (1943)
programme.desc: Seven women from vastly different backgrounds are brought together as volunteers in the Auxiliary Territorial Service during the Second World War. Despite their differences they become firm friends during training and on assignment driving military transport and operating anti-aircraft guns. Drama, starring Rosamund John, Joan Greenwood, Lilli Palmer, John Justin and Joan Gates

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri (1954)
programme.desc: An American naval reserve pilot is called up for service in the Korean War, and must leave his family and civilian job as a lawyer. In command of a corps of naval pilots, he heads a bombing campaign on strategic Communist positions, but later comes to question the morality of the conflict. Adventure, starring William Holden, Grace Kelly, Fredric March and Mickey Rooney

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2 (2017)
programme.desc: Having settled their differences, Brad and Dusty's newfound friendship is put to the test when their respective fathers - one gentle, the other overly macho - arrive for the Christmas holidays, forcing them to change their plans. What starts as a break at a fun-filled trip to a luxury resort turns into something far more chaotic. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Mark Wahlberg, Mel Gibson and John Lithgow

programme.title: A Quiet Place (2018)
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world, a family is forced to live in silence while hiding from monsters with hypersensitive hearing. Horror, starring Emily Blunt and John Krasinski, who also directed

programme.title: My Friend Dahmer (2017)
programme.desc: The early years of Ohio serial killer Jeffrey Dahmer are charted in this drama inspired by his friend Derf Backderf's graphic novel, starring Ross Lynch, Anne Heche and Alex Wolff

programme.title: The Riot Club (2014)
programme.desc: Two first year students at Oxford join an infamous drinking society for the University's privileged social elite. When they attend an annual dinner at a local pub, the new arrivals are shocked by how far their friends take their hedonistic lifestyle and contempt for others. Drama based on Laura Wade's stage play Posh, starring Sam Claflin, Max Irons and Natalie Dormer

programme.title: The Violent Men (1955)
programme.desc: A ruthless cattle baron sets out to create his own private empire, no matter what the cost. When he resorts to murder, he makes an enemy of a civil war veteran, while his lust for power drives his wife into the arms of his younger brother. Western, starring Edward G Robinson, Barbara Stanwyck and Glenn Ford

programme.title: 40 Guns to Apache Pass (1967)
programme.desc: A cavalry captain sets out to deliver a shipment of rifles to a fort besieged by marauding Apaches, but the mission is undermined by a villainous corporal who plans to steal the weapons and sell them to the enemy. Western, starring Audie Murphy, Michael Burns, Laraine Stephens, Kenneth Tobey and Michael Keep

programme.title: The Court-Martial of Billy Mitchell (1955)
programme.desc: In the 1920s, an American colonel accuses the war department of criminal negligence for denying the air force the funding it needs - but the powers-that-be still regard aircraft as an irrelevant part of the military, and respond by putting him on trial. Courtroom drama, starring Gary Cooper and Rod Steiger, with Ralph Bellamy and Elizabeth Montgomery

programme.title: The Last Frontier (1955)
programme.desc: A backwoods trapper signs up as a cavalry scout at a fort manned by inexperienced soldiers, where he falls in love with a colonel's wife. On taking over command of the garrison, the officer plans to lead his men in a reckless attack on a hostile Indian tribe - and it is down to the frontiersman to save his comrades from a massacre. Western, starring Victor Mature, Robert Preston and Anne Bancroft

programme.title: Home Again (2017)
programme.desc: Five months after separating from her husband, Alice Kinney and her daughters relocate from New York to her childhood home in Los Angeles, which belonged to her late father, Oscar-winning film director John Kinney. Eventually things take an unexpected turn when she lets three young guys move in with her. Romantic comedy, starring Reese Witherspoon, Michael Sheen and Candice Bergen

programme.title: Hunter Killer (2018)
programme.desc: Unconventional submarine skipper Joe Glass is sent to investigate the torpedoing of US and Russian vessels. He winds up trying to rescue the Russian president, who has been kidnapped by a rogue general. Action thriller, starring Gerard Butler, Gary Oldman and Common

programme.title: Blue Is the Warmest Colour (2013)
programme.desc: A 15-year-old girl falls in love with an older woman and tentatively begins a relationship. They remain together for years to come, as the teenager grows to adulthood and is inspired by her partner to explore her desires and develop her own outlook on the world. Romantic drama, with Lea Seydoux and Adele Exarchopoulos. In French and English

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Nancy needs more information about Jordan's death and wants to speak to Ella. Meanwhile, Maxine has an idea for Trish to make her mark on the village

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Featuring an attempt to get dressed on a treadmill, a vending machine, a fall into a river and a penalty kick back

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staff's attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: A few relationships are on thin ice as they head into the next dinner party, and different views of what unfolded during the homestays are shared with the group

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The last dinner party wreaked havoc on some couples and emotions are running high heading into the next commitment ceremony. There are big leaps forward - some are falling for each other and others are moving in together. The good news doesn't come without some bad when two pairs choose to leave the experiment

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Marriages come under the microscope as the couples have a sit-down meal with their loved ones. However, there is no holding back from the family members

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling business's fortunes. He faces a struggle because parent Adelle has a bad relationship with her staff and is disappointed by the resident chef, leaving Gordon with the added challenge of changing her attitude

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay gives his advice to Paul Bazzini, an award-winning chef from New York who now owns a restaurant in Ridgewood, New Jersey. Paul confesses he has lost his passion for food and is struggling to keep up with the business, a situation that seems evident to other members of staff, his wife and customers

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the comedy about scientists and their friendship with a down-to-earth neighbour. When aspiring actress Penny moves into Leonard's apartment block, he is immediately smitten, but Sheldon warns him that he runs the risk of a broken heart if he tries to woo her. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon helps Leonard drop off a parcel for Penny, but when he sees how messy her flat is, he tries to do a good deed - which is not well received. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is offered a visiting research fellowship at Princeton University, and Raj makes some new living arrangements. When the guys complete their infinite persistence gyroscope project, events spin out of control

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang become concerned when Sheldon's former admirer, Dr Ramona Nowitzki, resurfaces while Amy is away working at Princeton University. Jim Parsons stars

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2 (2011)
programme.desc: Martial arts master panda Po continues to hone his skills when an evil peacock, who was banished from China for trying to build a deadly new weapon, returns to cause more chaos. It falls to Po to defeat him, but he suffers strange flashbacks revealing a connection between his past and the sinister bird. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jack Black and Gary Oldman

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating: The Mansion
programme.desc: Joey Essex dates one girl, chats up another and kisses a third, while Chloe swings into action on a crazy golf date with new boy Anthony

programme.title: Temptation Island
programme.desc: After a couple of dates, couples consider whether the grass might be greener on the other side. Controversial social experiment, featuring four British couples being filmed as their relationships are put to the test in a variety of ways by a group of gorgeous singles in a Caribbean paradise

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The second half of the comedy challenge series kicks off here, and it looks as if four of the contestants still have a good chance of lifting Taskmaster Greg Davies's golden head in the final - regular viewers will no doubt have guessed whose chances are looking rather more bleak. This week, Daisy May Cooper gets rather cross, Mawaan Rizwan learns a lesson about waterfowl and Richard Herring wrings out a wet sock

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The biggest and best TV moments of the week get a grilling, including Seven Year Switch, the Winter Paralympics, Jane McDonald & Friends, The Andrew Marr Show, The World's Ugliest Pets and MAKE! Craft Britain

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating: The Mansion
programme.desc: Joey Essex dates one girl, chats up another and kisses a third, while Chloe swings into action on a crazy golf date with new boy Anthony

programme.title: Temptation Island

Controversial social experiment, featuring four British couples being filmed as their relationships are put to the test in a variety of ways by a group of gorgeous singles in a Caribbean paradise

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is upset to learn Penny is dating someone, so his friends encourage him to seek a new romance by asking another woman out. Sara Gilbert appears alongside her Roseanne co-star Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Raj take a heartbroken Howard to Las Vegas, where they pay a prostitute to spend time with him. Meanwhile, Sheldon finds himself locked out of his apartment and forced to stay the night at Penny's. With guest star Jodi Lynn O'Keefe (Prison Break)

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Pastry Day for the Heat B bakers and their last chance to win a place in Finals week. Judge Liam's Charles' technical challenge is an unusual hybrid requiring the bakers to demonstrate knowledge and techniques worthy of an advanced pastry chef. Then the bakers are tasked with creating a showstopper in the form of savoury hand pies. Hosted by Harry Hill

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Lois has a pregnancy scare that sparks tension in the household and reminds her and Hal how much their lives have been affected by their children. Comedy, starring Jane Kaczmarek and Bryan Cranston

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Malcolm and Stevie's families take a houseboat holiday together, but nothing seems to go to plan. Dewey is left hanging for hours on a rope swing and a friendly game of Scrabble turns into a slanging match. Meanwhile, Francis decides to quit school so he can head off to Alaska and earn a fortune on an oil rig

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon disagree over whether to continue holding their regular Roommate Agreement meetings, with Leonard suggesting they are no longer required, while Sheldon believes they are still essential. As the pair's squabble quickly escalates into a full-blown argument, the rest of their friends turn up for a planned Game of Thrones viewing party, and end up taking sides in the dispute - resulting in two warring factions taking up residence in 4A and 4B. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang goes to a bar and runs into Penny's old boyfriend Zack, while Bernadette is left to spend the evening with Sheldon when she cannot go wine tasting with the others. Elsewhere, things do not go to plan when Raj introduces his new girlfriend, Claire. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray fall out over Barry's plan to perform his martial arts routine at the annual high school talent show. Pops buys Erica an electric guitar, urging her to take to the stage and sing. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly complains that Pops is spending too much time with her at home, so Murray takes him to work at the furniture shop. Meanwhile, Adam reluctantly gives away his old toys in an effort to make him look more grown up, hoping it will result in a kiss with Dana. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jeffords' favourite author, DC Parlov, gets in touch after his latest manuscript is stolen, so Jeffords and Peralta convince Diaz to go undercover with them at a fantasy fiction convention to find the culprit. Back at the precinct, Holt, Santiago and Boyle take a forensics course, but Boyle's big mouth gets him in trouble

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While the squad attends a funeral in Los Angeles, Captain Holt learns that he is in the running for his dream job: Commissioner of the NYPD. however, after they miss their return flight to New York, Peralta must find a way to get Holt back in time for his interview. Santiago tries to convince everyone that she can be laid back, Jeffords panics about losing his first-class flight, and Boyle pries into Diaz's personal life

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is fired for being disrespectful to his boss, and explores new activities in a bid to find a purpose in life other than physics, but Leonard takes drastic action to restore him to his old self. Laurie Metcalf guest stars as Sheldon's mother

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny catches the eye of comic-book shopkeeper Stuart, and Leonard is devastated when she gives serious consideration to dating her new admirer. Desperate for help, Leonard enlists Sheldon to discredit his love rival by preying on his obsession with Batman. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Kevin Sussman star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon disagree over whether to continue holding their regular Roommate Agreement meetings, with Leonard suggesting they are no longer required, while Sheldon believes they are still essential. As the pair's squabble quickly escalates into a full-blown argument, the rest of their friends turn up for a planned Game of Thrones viewing party, and end up taking sides in the dispute - resulting in two warring factions taking up residence in 4A and 4B. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The family rally round when Erica is dumped by her boyfriend, and Beverly goes in search of a handsome replacement. Barry needs money when he becomes addicted to an arcade game

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray coaches Barry for his first high school wrestling match but keeps it a secret from Beverly, who is sure to disapprove of her son taking part in such a dangerous sport. Adam blackmails Erica into waiting in line with him to buy tickets for the new Stars Wars movie

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When a fire destroys Boyle's food truck, Pimento unexpectedly shows up at the scene, working as an insurance investigator. Diaz helps Santiago to see that it's fine to get excited about picking her wedding dress, while Gina and Jeffords coach Captain Holt in the art of social media. Comedy, starring Joe Lo Truglio and Jason Mantzoukas

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle organises an elaborate scavenger hunt for Peralta's bachelor party, but the guys take some short cuts that throw the event into disarray. Santiago's bachelorette party goes awry when it comes to light that she once slept with a member of the band that is to play at her wedding reception

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Marriages come under the microscope as the couples have a sit-down meal with their loved ones. However, there is no holding back from the family members

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A jealous Leonard argues with Penny when she invites one of her male friends to stay at her apartment while he is in town. Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard go camping to watch the Leonid meteor shower, but the trip takes an unexpected turn thanks to some specially baked cookies. Meanwhile, Penny injures herself in the shower, and with the rest of the gang out of town, it's left to Sheldon to come to her aid

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: As the experiment continues, things get wild during a night out where scandalous secrets are revealed and gossip leads to a confrontation that threatens to change everything

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating: The Mansion
programme.desc: The famous faces must decide which singles they want to keep dating and which to send packing, but Chloe is in her usual quandary and Joey's indecision upsets the single girls

programme.title: Temptation Island
programme.desc: The couples take time to reflect on their relationships, with some beginning to realise that coming to the island might have been a huge mistake

programme.desc: Sheldon discovers a surprise screening of The Avengers is scheduled at a local cinema, complete with a Q&A session with the film's director, Joss Whedon. Meanwhile, Leonard's mother Beverly arrives in town for an extended visit, and Penny takes the opportunity to bond with her new mother-in-law - and to make up for not inviting her to the wedding. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.desc: Adam plans to attend the school dance with Dana, and reluctantly agrees to take dancing lessons with Beverly. Meanwhile, Murray is forced to have the 'talk' with Adam, but he admits that he hasn't spoken to Barry about sex yet. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.desc: Diaz begs Peralta to help her break some big news to her parents, but her plan is thrown off track when Mr and Mrs Diaz wrongly assume that their daughter and her colleague are dating. The squad suffers internet problems after the Cyber Crimes Unit move into the office downstairs

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.desc: Adam tries to express his feelings for Dana by making her a mix tape, but disaster strikes when the tape falls into Beverly's hands. programme.title: Food Unwrapped Investigates
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the 2019 listeria outbreak in UK hospitals that left six dead and asks if enough is being done to protect vulnerable patients from a failing food safety system. She meets scientists to uncover just what listeria is and how the outbreak happened, goes inside a hospital kitchen to see first-hand how food is made and speaks with an anonymous government whistleblower who reveals cutbacks could mean another deadly outbreak will happen again

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect travels to Macclesfield to meet a first-time builder who hopes to transform an allotment shed into a Doctor Who-esque, multi-functional play den for less than £300. He also visits a spectacular live-in tree house in Scotland, and creates a medieval-style lock for the wood cabin, with Will's help. The Italian road trip takes in a holiday lodge made almost entirely from glass in the Dolomites

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: In the second episode, George Clarke is joined by leading architects to help transform a house belonging to Nick and Sonia, an appallingly designed flat spread over three dysfunctional car parking spaces. George charges award-winning architects Abigail Ashton and Andrew Porter with creating something beautiful from this monstrosity. But working with a budget of £75,000, can they transform this foul flat into a proper home with two floors? And what will the pair's neighbours make of the drastic changes?

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke meets single father Rick, whose four-storey terrace in Stratford-upon-Avon has just one room per floor and is totally impractical when his children come to stay. Can the architect come up with a clever redesign to create space and much-needed character? He also helps single mum Donna in Hastings, whose Victorian double reception room has not been touched for 50 years

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree only have a few weeks to prepare for their wedding, but the chateau is nowhere near ready to receive the 200 guests they have invited and finding reliable, affordable workers is proving difficult. Dick oversees the damming of the moat and the installation of a new, eco-friendly sewage system, while Angel turns her attention to giving the rooms a distinctive decor

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Jasmine House in Lutterworth, Leicestershire managed by Donna Taylor who believes in a no frills approach. But it doesn't take long for Martin and Sara to realise all the added extras in the room don't add up. During the afternoon Leslie and Chloe show their fighting spirit during a kickboxing lesson and all the B&Bers square up to their host

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the luxury Halliwell House in Cheshire for the third day of the contest, where owners Martin Hulme and Sara Williams charge nearly £500 per night. Donna is astonished at the room rates, while David and Ewa are expecting nothing but perfection, but the self-service approach at breakfast confuses the guests, leaving Martin and Sara defiant in the face of their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final two days see the contestants staying the night at Soar Chapel Guest House in Ebbw Vale, the family home of mum and daughter Lesley and Chloe Priestly. Expectations are high for this duo and one guest in particular is not disappointed. Things get going in the afternoon during a beatboxing contest, although old tensions resurface at dinner and the hosts are left to calm things down. A massive spread is laid on at breakfast, but when one guest takes issue with the cooked items, Lesley and Chloe worry what impact it will have come payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. David and Ewa Woodward want to challenge Martin's criticism over the way they run their business. Next, Donna Taylor wants to find out more about the issue that caused Martin and Sara to lose sleep. Needless to say, there is tension in the air and axes to grind, before the winner is revealed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final day in Hertfordshire, Heath Reid hopes his Italian-influenced dishes will be enough to secure him the £1,000 prize money

programme.title: A Taste of Italy

The complicated build proves difficult for Paul's local team, and their ambitious schedule of completing the project in a year soon looks out of reach

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Orang-utan sisters Emma and Subis are due to give birth at the same time, but after being in labour for more than 24 hours with no progress, Subis is rushed to the vet for a possible C-section. Meerkats Beagle and Huskie have moved to the zoo as the new breeding pair, but their new housemates, the aardvarks, are making them anxious. In an effort to make them more comfortable in their new home, the team decide to redesign the paddock to give the meerkats their own space

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Surrey couple Debbie and Simon move into their fairy-tale castle, while Belinda and Lee expand their events portfolio by hosting a classic car weekend

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Claire Farrow and husband Ian Hogarth, who are trying to build a home containing a sauna, spa, dance floor and DJ booth on a small patch of land in Kensington, north London. They have applied for planning permission to include a basement and started work on the construction, but setbacks, including their digger smashing into a neighbour's wall and the re-emergence of the old river under the building, threaten to prevent them completing the project

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: With autumn just around the corner, it's a chance for the Strawbridge family to make the most of the wild larder on their doorstep. Dick is determined to make sloe gin, while Angel presses on with her plan to create a library in the pepper pot tower

programme.title: Back to the
programme.desc: Lenny Henry is the first of four celebrities taking viewers on a guided tour of all things Channel 4. He examines how Mary Whitehouse was decrying blasphemy in Brookside within a week of the channel's launch, and looks at the success of Countdown. Cameras also focus on cult live music strand The Tube, and hit shows Whose Line Is It Anyway, and The Comic Strip Presents

programme.title: Test Cricket Highlights
programme.desc: India v England. Rishi Persad presents action from day four of the Second Test in the four-match series, held at MA Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Peggy, 85, arrives at the hospital by ambulance, having injured her knee at home. It's the second time she has fallen in two months and medics want to find out if there's a more serious underlying cause. Meanwhile, the team keeps a close eye on 75-year-old Bob, who has had a suspected heart attack, and Ben, 25, isn't overly concerned by his swollen finger, until a doctor diagnoses cellulitis

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, with Sean Lock and Sara Pascoe taking on Jon Richardson and Josh Widdicombe. Susie Dent is joined by Alex Horne and the Horne Section in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Cheating in the football match backfires on Ted, prompting his Rugged Island rivals to think up a devilish forfeit - and leaving the priest trying to contrive a way of kicking Bishop Brennan's backside and getting away with it. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon

He samples seafood and regional cuisine, as well as exploring a variety of traditional recipes, including artichoke salad with poached egg, eels in cider, and bass with beurre blanc

programme.title: Rick Stein's French Odyssey
programme.desc: The connoisseur of local food explores the banks of the River Garonne on board a 100-year-old converted barge, and savours the delights of French provincial cooking including magret de canard and petit sale. Other dishes featured are clams in white garlic sauce, eels in parsley and garlic butter, and steak tartare

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets behind the wheel of a Reliant Robin to investigate the reasons behind the lack of three-wheeled cars on the market. programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Coverage of the offbeat event which comes from the Cauberg, a hill in the southern town of Valkenburg, Holland

programme.desc: Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz head west to where the buffalo roam and the skies are not cloudy all day in search of the most perfect picks on the range

programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson spares no expense when he tests the BMW X6. Plus, musician Seasick Steve is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

Rob Brydon hosts

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: A compilation of extra material from the comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon. programme.title: Mortimer & Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Cameras follow old friends Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer as they continue on their angling trip round the UK. This time, Paul and Bob fish the river Wensum in Norfolk for Roach, but as the pair struggle up and down the riverbanks, they begin to realise how age is starting to take its toll on their physicality. After staying overnight in a disused train station and visiting a local pub, the pair decide to challenge each other to a fishing competition the following day, where the winner gets a very special culinary treat

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan, Matt Lucas and Liza Tarbuck join regular panellist Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig for an extended edition of the unconventional quiz. This time, the focus falls on the theme 'Odds and Ends'. During the course of the show, the panellists learn how to tell a schnauzerorgan from a paddywhack. As ever, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window, as the fiendishly difficult questions lead to points being awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting, as opposed to correct

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The trio of motoring enthusiasts embark on another epic road trip, this time across western America in front-engined supercars. Jeremy Clarkson pilots the Lexus LFA, which has a spectacularly high-revving V10 powerplant, Richard Hammond gets behind the wheel of the muscular Dodge Viper, and James May opts for the latest incarnation of Aston Martin's Vanquish. On their journey from Las Vegas to Palm Springs via Los Angeles, the presenters tackle racing circuits and find themselves in a race against the police, before rushing to the Mexican border - and there's a terrifying penalty for the last man to arrive. Meanwhile, Fleetwood Mac drummer Mick Fleetwood rolls up his sleeves to thrash the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May embark on a race from London's Wembley Stadium to Milan's San Siro, the home of Italian football giants AC and Inter. A price restriction leads Jeremy to grab the keys to a Shelby Mustang GT500, which costs the equivalent of £35,000 in America and packs a supercharged punch of more than 650bhp. James and Richard pin their hopes on the pan-European rail network in a bid to secure the prize of tickets to a top-flight football match, with nothing but a long journey home awaiting the losers. On the test track, Jeremy puts Toyota's GT86 coupe through its paces, and its promise of entertaining rear-wheel-drive handling should put a smile on his face. Plus, singer-songwriter Amy Macdonald gets to grips with the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.desc: Outspoken hairdresser Patrick McMurray hosts the final party in Sutton Coldfield, and prepares a scallop starter and a classic beef Wellington. His first course goes down well, but Sharon soon becomes bored with his constant showing off - and it remains to be seen whether his saucy entertainment will prove a hit with the female guests

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Anne Hogarth first fell in love with Lanzarote over a decade ago and now, after several visits to the island since, is looking for a holiday home to enjoy in her retirement. With her daughter Rachel along for moral support, Jonnie Irwin shows Anne five properties in the resort of Puerto del Carmen for her £85,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: In southern Spain, Jonnie Irwin goes house-hunting in and around the hill-top town of Competa, Andalucia, with Michael and Seamus from Northern Ireland. The duo love cooking and entertaining and are searching for a holiday home where they can invite all their friends. However, while Seamus likes a modern style, Michael has much more traditional tastes, so with a budget of £175,000 and five options up his sleeve, Jonnie tries to come up with the perfect property to suit them both

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Sarah and Adam from Sussex search for a holiday home in the coastal town of Mojacar, Spain, with a budget of £85,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Mariam and Nasser, from the West Midlands, find a family holiday home they can eventually retire to in the countryside of Murcia, south-east Spain. The couple used to live near Madrid and desperately miss the Spanish sunshine and way of life, especially the outdoor cooking. Laura has five sizzling hot properties to show them for their £70,000 budget

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners compete for the £1,000 prize in the Colchester area, with Yvonne and Neil kicking off the week with a Spanish-themed menu. Tony and Victoria serve up a menu of hearty pub food, but a mix-up in the kitchen leads to a very disappointed guest, and on the final night, Darren and Amy aim to impress with an evening of unprocessed food

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival couples in Essex and east London compete in the dinner-party challenge, beginning with Spencer and Sara's simple Jewish feast. Reserved pair Lauren and Jack prepare a sophisticated menu reflecting the hosts' heritage in South Africa and Burma. For the final dinner, Paul and Ed opt for a flavourful fare that proves a bit much for those with a fondness for plainer food, and with the contest over, the competitors anxiously wait to discover which party was considered the best

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Following a recent health scare, beauty consultant Marcelle and coach company owner Graeme are seizing the moment and about to buy a holiday home in western Malaga for stress-free holidays together. They'd love to find an apartment near the town of Benalmádena with a communal pool and private outdoor space and have given Jasmine Harman a budget of £120,000 to find the perfect property

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies is on Spain's Costa Blanca house-hunting around the vibrant resort of Villamartin with Amanda and Steve, who want to buy a holiday home where they can spend the winter months golfing, socialising and soaking up the sun. Danni has been given a budget of £85,000, with which she finds five properties that she thinks fits the bill. Will Amanda and Steve love one of them sufficiently to buy it?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson and Lucy Beaumont take on Roisin Conaty and Joe Wilkinson in the comedy words-and-numbers game, while Bec Hill joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Glyn, a 60-year-old disco-dancing entertainer from Essex, hopes to find the perfect partner with whom he can dance off into the sunset. Twenty-eight-year-old Jamie has been on lots of dates, but she keeps meeting cheaters who leave her feeling cold, and needs the show's help to find an honest guy. Presented by Anna Richardson

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's Terracotta Week in the pottery, and the potters are tasked to make their own range of cookware. Judge Rich Miller sets a second terracotta challenge to engrave tiles, before he and fellow judge Keith Brymer Jones decide who will be potter of the week and who will be leaving the competition. Siobhan McSweeney hosts

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: The presenter explores the UK's wildest, most remote and beautifully designed holiday homes, accompanied by some of the nation's most fascinating and funny women. From a lighthouse cottage on a private island near the Isle of Skye and a stunning tree house in the Wye Valley, to the only nature reserve in England in which you can stay, every episode visits a different region and promises hidden away places offering glorious sanctuary. In the opening edition, Sandi is joined by legendary actor Alison Steadman to seek out extraordinary escapes in the wilds of Suffolk

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George looks back at his first ever big build, in which he enlisted the help of friend and design guru Will Hardie to convert a dilapidated 1970s caravan bought for £300 into a stylish holiday home for him and his children. Along the way, George takes inspiration from other ingenious caravan and self-build conversions, including lovingly restored gypsy wagons - and to make the most of the space, he even comes up with a sofa that doubles up as a bath

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In the small fishing village of Polperro in southern Cornwall, harbourmaster Olly Puckey prepares for the arrival of a new storm gate, designed to protect residents, houses and fishing boats from the winter sea surges. In Devon, dairy farmer Jon Perkin hopes visitors at Widdecombe Fair are willing to try his alternative ice-cream and yoghurt, while stonemason Alex Piper and glazier Arthur Bradley must draw on all their skills and experience to save the crumbling vestry window of a church in the Cornish village of Warbstow

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In 2018, Clare and Matt had viewed more than 30 houses around Leamington Spa, before Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer worked their magic. Now Phil's back to find things are very different from before. In 2017, the duo helped first-time buyers Louise and Johnny in expensive Weybridge. Two years on, Phil discovers that was just the start of an exciting time for this couple

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the White Swan in Deighton, North Yorkshire, where Roman Solnar and Tamsyn Muller hope their guests will appreciate their no-nonsense approach

programme.desc: The competition starts at the White Swan in Deighton, North Yorkshire, where Roman Solnar and Tamsyn Muller hope their guests will appreciate their no-nonsense approach

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A weaver in Portugal juggles teaching with preparing for her first exhibition, while in Andalucía, owners of a B&B establishment host a trial weekend to see whether they have a viable business. Reality series following Brits as they launch new businesses across France, Spain, Italy and Portugal

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

But will it be a town house or a rustic finca that wins them over?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Semi-retired travel rep Nicola Harrison from Dorset has spent a season 22 years ago looking after holiday-makers in the Algarve, and now fancies moving there herself. She enlists the help of Jasmine Harman who looks for properties that will aid Nicola in the next chapter of her life

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Guildford, Surrey, the first host is glamorous 22-year-old cosmetic-surgery-fan Shanice, who hopes to show she is more than just a pretty face by serving up sumptuous food and dazzling conversation. The guests she must impress are 32-year-old entertainer David, 69-year-old Norwegian plain-talker Vivi, 47-year-old super-competitive Neil and 25-year-old media sales worker Charlotte. With risky menu choices and a fellow diner's peculiar laughter taking the spotlight, will the conversations ranging from lookalikes to riding polar bears be enough to secure Shanice the prize?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired estate agent Vivi hosts the second dinner party in and around Guildford. She is convinced her experience and original Scandinavian fayre can beat her less experienced competition and the soiree features Norwegian fish soup, ghost stories, ghost impressions, Norwegian singing and nursery rhymes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sales manager Charlotte hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in and around Guildford, hoping to impress her guests enough to win the £1,000 prize money. However, she has taken a huge risk with an Asian-inspired menu, which could prove to be too exotic for entertainments manager David

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The penultimate day in and around Guildford, Surrey, sees children's entertainments manager David playing host. Having worked in the entertainments industry all his life, he is no stranger to showing people a good time, and employs his colleagues to put on a performance, while keeping his food simple. Is he forgetting the key ingredients of a dinner party?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final day in and around Guildford, Surrey, sales director Neil devises a sophisticated menu, dismissing his predecessors' efforts as unambitious. However, his unusual fayre is tempered by his choice of yodelling entertainment, which threatens to hinder his chance of scooping the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Mend It for Money

Ian wanted to move on, but Sarah was determined to stay, convinced their home had the potential to cater for a growing family. Now, Phil returns to find out what happened next

programme.title: Undercover Police: Hunting Paedophiles
programme.desc: Following a middle-aged male undercover officer as he assumes a new identity as a 13-year-old girl from Essex and begins engaging online with people who have demonstrated a sexual interest in children. programme.title: Back
programme.desc: Stephen sees a chance to redeem himself when the John Barleycorn hosts a pub quiz against the team that beat them last time - an incident for which his father never forgave him. programme.title: It's a Sin
programme.desc: Ritchie and Jill hatch a scheme to buy the Pink Palace, Ash finds himself battling Clause 28, while Roscoe hopes that his secret lover can take him far away from his 'ordinary' life. A lonely journey home to the Isle of Wight turns into a dark night of the soul when Ritchie has to confront certain truths. Back in London, the protests against the government's handling of the Aids crisis begin. Russell T Davies drama, starring Olly Alexander, Nathaniel Curtis, Lydia West and Omari Douglas

programme.title: Secret Safari: Into the Wild
programme.desc: The youngest of the conservancy's eight ostriches prepares for mating, and the rangers hope this will lead to increased numbers for their dwindling flock of the birds. A lioness searches for her three cubs, which have gone missing following a buffalo attack, and a one-armed baboon attempts to ingratiate himself with a new troop after being rejected by his own

Jean and Stuart Knight are planning to spend several weeks there every year both on their own and also with family and friends. Ben Hillman shows the pair five options within their budget of £60,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps former firefighter Gary Sheen and his partner Kevin Lambert from Essex find a new home in the Altea region of Spain's Costa Blanca. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first night in Peterborough, 39-year-old land surveyor and part-time musician Muneer hopes to win over his guests with a menu based on Pakistani recipes passed down through his family for generations. The authenticity extends beyond his food, with Muneer seating his guests on the floor of his specially dressed dining room. His guests include driving instructor Christine, hairdresser Ben, fiery Brazilian Rosie and fridge salesman Gregory. While his food receives mixed reviews, His guests discover his master plan for musical success, suffer bad jokes and find out that one of their fellow diners believes in mermaids

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Peterborough, driving instructor Christine hopes her vegetarian cuisine will grab her the £1,000 prize. But she's worried about being in the firing line, after Rosie compared Muneer's food to vomit on the first night. Now Moony's determined to give Rosie a public dressing down. However, with everyone dreading Christine's meat-free and bland-sounding menu, Rosie may not be the only one who has to bite her lip

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Peterborough, mobile hairdresser Ben plans a gourmet night. Most of his guests are looking forward to some meat after Christine's vegetarian feast the night before. And after laid-back Muneer and critical Rosie seem to have put their tension behind them at Christine's, Ben's determined to take things up a notch as he entertains his guests with his amazing body art, cooking skills and pet crabs

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fridge salesman Gregory serves up a Spanish menu in Peterborough, accompanied by a charm offensive that he hopes will win him the £1,000 prize. Will it work or will the guests give him the cold shoulder?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fiery Brazilian Rosie is confident that her night will be the best of the week in Peterborough. After Gregory used packet mixes, Rosie is determined to show him how to throw a dinner party by making everything from scratch. She's ruffled a few feathers throughout the week with her brutally honest critiques, and her guests, roused for retribution, scour every element of her Brazilian night for any faults, from her samba dancers to her authentic pig-ear stew

Along the way, George takes inspiration from other ingenious caravan and self-build conversions, including lovingly restored gypsy wagons - and to make the most of the space, he even comes up with a sofa that doubles up as a bath

programme.title: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: When elderly teacher Peter Farquhar was found dead at home in the village of Maids Moreton in 2015, it was sad and unexpected, but no one thought it suspicious. But 18 months later, when his neighbour Ann Moore-Martin also fell ill and died, the police decided to look again. They found that Ben Field, a would-be vicar and academic, had recently become part of both of their lives and benefited from their wills. This programme shows that by delving back in time through friends' and loved ones' memories of Peter and Ben's relationship, as well as Peter's diary, the police discovered a story of love and betrayal

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A couple of landlords fall foul of two young YouTube stars who are using their rental property as a film set - and to make matters worse, the tenants have stopped paying their rent but are refusing to leave. In Chelmsford, eviction lawyer Chris receives a shock when he tries to evict a group of squatters from an abandoned printworks, and in Hampstead, London, a landlord investigates when neighbours complain about noise from one of his flats

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord offers a former tenant the use of a spare room until she gets back on her feet, but then struggles to evict her - and things get even more difficult when the woman moves her partner in. A landlord travelling abroad has to return to London when her tenants stop paying the rent, and Harrow Council officers find 30 mattresses in a flat designed for four people

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Mansfield mother-of-two Kerrie was left feeling betrayed after renting her house to a friend in need, who then stopped paying any rent. To add insult to injury, she also ruined the house by keeping too many dogs at the property. Mental health nurse Emmanuel found himself in a financial hole when his tenant stopped paying rent or answering his calls, and a landlord in Notting Hill ended up being owed £16,000 after five months of receiving no rent

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Documentary about the horrors of the rental market including a landlord who decided to sell his east London flat so he could afford a property with his girlfriend. But when he told his tenant, things quickly turned sour and the man stopped paying rent and refused to leave. Plus, the story of a pub owner in Lincolnshire trying to evict his tenant, having rented it 10 years ago on a 'gentleman's handshake'. Now, however, he is owed a staggering £40,000 in unpaid rent

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: In north London, Harrow council officers investigate an overcrowded property. An inspection uncovers many issues, including an unauthorised loft conversion that is a danger to the tenants who sleep there. A couple in Suffolk agree to rent a property to its former owner, who now refuses to leave, and a single mum tricks her way into a Milton Keynes property, confirming she has paid the deposit having done no such thing

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Steve discover a locked wooden case when they are called to evict tenants from a flat in London's Docklands. Opening it up, they realise they urgently need police back-up - and the property quickly becomes a crime scene. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town FC to collect a debt, while Paul's team arrives at a property in Essex to find that they have to remove a woman and her six children

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul, Steve and Ben make a shocking discovery when they break into a home in Essex while serving an eviction notice on a single mother and her two children. Meanwhile, Stewart and Iain receive more than just threats from the staff and owner of a taxi business, a car dealer has to choose between paying up or losing his showroom stars, and an Indian restaurant owner is in danger of losing his livelihood

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve make an extraordinary discovery inside a locked bedroom, and immediately call for police back-up. Brian and Graham head to Swindon Town football club to recover a debt, while Paul and Ben have difficulty evicting a couple from a house in Kent after learning they have six children and nowhere else to go

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve's first job is an eviction with a twist when they find out the landlord is the tenant's son, while their next case is also tricky and involves family members with a question mark over their immigration status who are now facing homelessness. Their final case involves a man with a history of mental illness who has reached the end of his tenancy but refuses to leave, and Steve tries to find a solution after a church minister and his mother fail to placate him

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner get caught up in a dispute between a landlord and a tenant who refuses to move out, and Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin chase a £17,000 debt. In Essex, a couple owe their neighbour £11,000, and on the south coast, debt collection from a Turkish restaurant gets complicated when there is confusion about ownership

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A Devon woman finds herself spending a night in the cells after a dispute with a neighbour who just happens to be a policeman, while a York man gets an unexpected soaking after an argument with the person next door. In Glasgow, an upset over an invitation leads to a hospital visit and a criminal record for one unhappy homeowner

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Featuring two quarrelling neighbours who record each other's every moment on CCTV and in diaries. Their dispute began when Thomas parked his caravan on a quiet cul-de-sac, much to the annoyance of his neighbour Mrs Potter. Plus, how a shared driveway pushed Susie to breaking point when her neighbour Grant put her young daughter at risk. Susie decided to install gates across the drive and use it for family barbecues, but Grant took matters into his own hands and it ended in a trip to the police station for him

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A man living in Cumbria takes issue with his neighbour's habit of letting his menagerie of chickens, cockerels, parrots and other birds freely wander along a residential road, and is even more disturbed by the fact that some of his fellow residents don't seem to have a problem with it. A former urban couple who moved to a rural valley in north Wales to breed horses enter open conflict with the owners of a nearby yurt business, whose fireworks parties spooked one of their prized beasts, resulting in an injury. Finally, a Romanian woman finds herself subject to abuse when she tries to set up a new home with her daughter in Wigan

programme.title: The Disappearance of Shannon Matthews
programme.desc: First in a two-part documentary about the disappearance of nine-year-old Shannon Matthews in Yorkshire in 2008, an investigation that gripped the nation, which turned out to be hoax kidnapping plot devised by her mother. Featuring exclusive interviews with Shannon's best friend, members of the local community, and the police officers who eventually found her, the programme reveals the remarkable truth of what really happened

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: Examining the murder of retired schoolteacher Alethea Taylor. She went missing in 2012 and her body has never been found. Alethea's friends and family are among the contributors

programme.title: Murdered By
programme.desc: An investigation into the stabbing of 20-year-old Sam Caulfield in Crawley, West Sussex. Including contributions from the victim's family, revealing how this ultimate betrayal has changed their lives for ever

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Between 1975 and 1980, serial killer Peter Sutcliffe - known in the press as the Yorkshire Ripper - murdered 13 women and attacked at least seven more in the north of England. In this programme, psychologists and criminology experts analyse the personality of Sutcliffe and look at events in his childhood and adult life that may have triggered his descent into murder, and also examine how he managed to avoid suspicion despite being interviewed by police numerous times

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Documentary looking at how the German supermarket has succeeded in the UK, overcoming industry hostility and old-fashioned snobbery to win the public over with its discounted goods. Former staff reveal how Aldi has overcome shoppers' suspicions using a host of clever techniques to cut costs, from multiple barcodes and less time spent at the tills, to their own-brand products - which are intended to look and taste like their big-name counterparts, but cost a fraction of the price

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Reality show in which two families from opposite ends of the wealth and class divide swap homes, budgets and social status for seven days to discover how the other half lives. The Fiddes family from Royal Wootton Bassett rank in the top 10 per cent of Britain's wealthy, and live in a six-bedroom home paid for by husband Matt's chain of martial arts centres. For the four-strong Leamon family, who are among the nation's poorest 10 per cent, the swap means leaving their four-bedroom terrace on a Southampton council estate, and enjoying a weekly budget of £1,500 instead of their usual £170

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Nick Wallis examines how CCTV means wrongdoers can no longer hide in a crowd, looking at its use in convicting people involved in the August 2011 riots across England
