programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: A young, self-made businessman spends time living with a single mother and her three children, who survive on her disability benefits

programme.title: Grime and Punishment: Dirty Britain
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams and inspectors out to nail the litter louts and the fearless sewage warriors clearing the mess. The first episode features enforcement officers Wayne and Dan, who are on the hunt for fly-tippers. Their job is to investigate tips across Cardiff to try to find crucial evidence that will lead them to who dumped the rubbish

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Documentary about the horrors of the rental market. English teacher Muhammad is suffering from serious financial difficulty as his tenant has refused to pay rent for more than four months - and to make matters worse, the tenant has been subletting rooms in his property. In north-west London, a bedsit fire exposes a negligent landlord, while in Cheshire, Carl is shocked to hear squatters are living in his property

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A couple of landlords fall foul of two young YouTube stars who are using their rental property as a film set - and to make matters worse, the tenants have stopped paying their rent but are refusing to leave. In Chelmsford, eviction lawyer Chris receives a shock when he tries to evict a group of squatters from an abandoned printworks, and in Hampstead, London, a landlord investigates when neighbours complain about noise from one of his flats

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers pursue two knife-wielding criminals driving a stolen vehicle, and the number plate on a drug dealer's car flashes up on the police radar, leading to a risky interception

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The unit is called to the heart of the Essex countryside to help rescue a farmworker pinned beneath a tractor, and the air support crew is sent out at night to hunt down a car thief in Southend. Meanwhile, the interceptors pursue a rogue driver around the back alleys of north-east London

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Car thieves steal a BMW and as they lead officers in a high speed chase across north London their attempts to escape become more and more desperate. Another driver is spotted swerving across the motorway, and the Interceptors find him to be four times over the drink driving limit. Meanwhile, a group of teenagers is pulled over for a routine stop-and-search, and found to be armed and ready for any encounter

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Elmore are met with lies and aggression when they track down nearly £3,000 owed by a garage mechanic, while Steve and Ben encounter a retired couple who are being forced to leave their home. Stuart and Vic revisit a young debtor who owe £750 for a laptop computer, and in Oxfordshire, Paul and Steve chase £30,000 owed by a world-famous Formula One racing team

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Iain head to Manchester, where a landlord is owed £8,000 in rent arrears and has already called for police back-up. As tempers rise, the pair must find a way to handle a situation that is spiralling dangerously out of control. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase £3,000 owed to a firm of letting agents, before tracking a debtor who was accidentally over-paid for a job. Plus, Stewart and Iain face an eviction that is set to test their patience

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly £2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost £3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Harlow is unsure what to do about Hendrix, while Mackenzie becomes concerned Amy is a loose cannon, and Shane and Amy toast their future, unaware of trouble that is approaching

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ari heads home to delivers the news that he found Dean, while Irene persuades Jasmine to visit Colby in jail. Roo reveals the news about the arrival of her half-brother

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Neil and Louise Brimicombe swap their three-bedroom house on a Watford estate to spend a week in the six-bedroom Chelmsford home of restaurateurs Steve and Jo Haslam - and vice versa - to see how the other half lives. The Brimicombes and their children will see their weekly budget increase from £140 to a massive £3,000, and will also enjoy nightly takeaways, three cars, regular pampering sessions and expensive shopping trips. Meanwhile, Jo is away on business so Steve will be left as a single parent - how will he cope given he has never even worked a washing machine?

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall tries to help the owners of Bella the collie in Sheffield, whose aggression has become so extreme that people can no longer visit the house and the family cannot take the pet out in public. Graeme also meets Toby, a stroppy basset hound that enjoys sitting on the kitchen counter, and Dave, the French bulldog with a penchant for eating its own droppings

programme.title: Bargain Brits on Benefits
programme.desc: Cameras follow John, who has turned trash into compost cash, and Cathy has found a way to feed her son the very best food for free

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Anna and John have to work hard to get to the root of an almighty blockage threatening to send a tsunami of waste gushing into a bungalow. In Lewes, East Sussex, after one of the biggest bonfire night celebrations in the country, filth fighters reveal the trade secrets of clearing up the mess left by the 80,000 revellers

programme.title: Student Sex Workers
programme.desc: Students who have turned to the sex industry to make ends meet, including Ella, who is both a law and criminology graduate and an award-winning porn star, and Akonne, who is now in his second year of a sports science degree, and has been stripping for audiences since he was 20

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: A driver is trapped in his car after it careered out of control, smashing into a wall before flipping sideways onto a driveway. Dr Polly Haywood and critical care paramedic Sarah Folley are sent to the scene

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: A young man has to be restrained by police officers and security personnel in the ambulance bay after shouting and swearing at medical staff. Simon is rushed to hospital with serious injuries after being thrown off his horse and cart at high speed, and an initial CT scan reveals the 73-year-old has multiple broken bones

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Homeless
programme.desc: Gadget-loving 21-year-old Josh lives on a country estate with mum and dad, and is convinced that when he lives rough on the streets for three nights, he will easily make money

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Angelina, a wealthy 16-year-old, goes to live with teenage mum Amy, and learns about the responsibilities of being a mother - but ultimately cracks and checks into a hotel

programme.title: Grime and Punishment: Dirty Britain
programme.desc: The hidden army of enforcement teams and inspectors out to nail the litter louts and the fearless sewage warriors clearing the mess. Enforcement officers Dan and Jude are on the hunt for fly-tippers and rubbish dumpers blighting the beautiful countryside of the Malvern Hills, while Rob, Gary and John deal with the rivers of fat and wet wipes blocking London's sewers. In Wolverhampton, cleaners Jakob and Wojtek face a toxic clean-up thanks to someone storing 50 bottles of urine in a cupboard, while across the city a crime scene is in urgent need of a deep clean

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord offers a former tenant the use of a spare room until she gets back on her feet, but then struggles to evict her - and things get even more difficult when the woman moves her partner in. A landlord travelling abroad has to return to London when her tenants stop paying the rent, and Harrow Council officers find 30 mattresses in a flat designed for four people

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Stavros and Emily try to get their house back from squatters, while Margaret attempts to recover the £20,000 she is owed from a letting agent, and Peterborough council find 12 people crammed into a category-one fire hazard house. Documentary series in which cameras follow the victims and villains of the buy-to-let boom

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers pursue international car thieves as they try to leave the country in a stolen BMW, and police chase a drink-driver through Epping Forest. In Southend, burglary suspects fleeing back to London find themselves surrounded by multiple interceptor units

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The unit's hi-tech helicopter is called on to help pursue a motorcyclist riding at speeds of up to 130mph and showing no sign of slowing down for oncoming traffic or police cars. A petrol thief risks danger when trying to destroy evidence, and an officer tests the latest weapon in the fight against crime - a Subaru Impreza STi

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The police dog unit is called into action to chase a thief seen trying to break into a lorry, and the pursuit of a Range Rover leads the interceptors to a haul of stolen prestige cars. A seized Lamborghini brings out the team's competitive streak, and the presence of an intruder puts the station on full alert

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly £2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost £3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Steve are sent to north London to evict a young Romanian mother who owes £6,000 in unpaid rent, but when they arrive, they discover a family home that is not quite what it appears to be. Meanwhile, in Kent, Brian and Alan turn up the pressure on a debtor who has admitted to owing more than £7,000, but claims he cannot afford to pay up - despite having a garage full of expensive tools. Later, in south-west London, Brian accompanies Delroy as he tries to recover a £400,000 debt from a residential property, and when the pair trace the defaulter to an upmarket cafe, the man in charge lies about his identity

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: One-off edition in which the High Court enforcement agents are caught in the crossfire of three bitter family disputes, including a debt-dodging man who pushes his panic-stricken mother over the edge. Plus, a family booted onto the streets at night by a ruthless aunt, and a man who won't engage with the agents and loses his car

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Hendrix is devastated by the split with Harlow, while Jay is surprised to realise Mack might have feelings for him. Dipi and Amy end up in a lip-synch battle against each other

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Justin finally speaks to Christian, while Ziggy asks Tane to come in and help at the garage, but an armed police raid changes things. Tori works up the courage to confront Jasmine

programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell
programme.desc: Police in Hereford make anti-social pavement parking a top priority, but their operation results in emergency services finding themselves stuck in the middle. Meanwhile, At Weston-super-Mare, it's one of the busiest days of the year-the beach race day, which proves difficult for traffic enforcement officers to control

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Officers in Huntingdon explain that they had a problem with regular drunken violence at weekends, but that CCTV is at the forefront of their initiative to turn things around. Nick Wallis also discovers how CCTV is helping Chester's local council and the police manage problems on Race Day

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: The case of Carol Taggart, a 54-year-old mother of three, who has seemingly been murdered by her own son in Scotland

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and criminology experts analyse the personalities of some of the world's most infamous murderers, and consider what may have motivated them to carry out horrific crimes

programme.title: Single White Female (1992)
programme.desc: Software designer Allison is looking for a flatmate and seems to have struck lucky with shy applicant Hedra. However, Allison soon comes to realise her new friend is dangerously obsessed with her, and when she plans a reconciliation with her former boyfriend, a jealous Hedra becomes increasingly unhinged. Psychological thriller, with Bridget Fonda, Jennifer Jason Leigh, and Steven Weber

programme.title: Columbo: Identity Crisis (1975)
programme.desc: A CIA operative arranges a grisly fate for a fellow spy who found out that he was working as a double agent. The killer makes the murder look like a random mugging, but he is not as clever as he thinks and the crumpled cop soon begins to pick up on the trail of clues he has left behind. Crime drama, directed by and starring Patrick McGoohan, with Peter Falk and Leslie Nielsen

programme.title: Columbo: How to Dial a Murder (1978)
programme.desc: After discovering that his best friend and his wife were having an affair, a renowned psychologist uses his unique mind-control powers to commit a bizarre murder - with the help of two pet dogs conditioned to attack when they hear a certain command. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Nicol Williamson, Frank Aletter and Kim Cattrall

programme.title: Columbo: A Bird in the Hand (1992)
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler with a mountain of debts comes up with a plan to make some easy money. He plants a bomb under his wealthy uncle's car in the hope of inheriting a large legacy - but a hit-and-run driver jeopardises the entire scheme and Columbo is soon sniffing around for clues. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Tyne Daly, Greg Evigan and Don S Davis

programme.title: Columbo: A Friend in Deed (1974)
programme.desc: A Californian police commissioner helps a rich, influential friend to conceal his complicity in murdering his own wife - but reckons without detective Columbo's timely intervention and his dogged determination to bring the truth to light. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Richard Kiley and Rosemary Murphy

programme.title: Columbo: Publish or Perish (1974)
programme.desc: A ruthless publisher hires a hitman to kill a best-selling author who has threatened to sign with a rival company - but reckons without the involvement of the cigar-smoking sleuth, who is determined to put the culprit behind bars. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Mickey Spillane, Jack Cassidy and John Chandler

programme.title: Columbo: Old Fashioned Murder (1976)
programme.desc: A woman who has devoted her life to running her family's museum is outraged when her brother decides to sell it. Knowing of someone with criminal connections, she arranges to have her brother killed. However, just when she starts to think she has got away with it, a certain shabby sleuth is assigned to the case. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Joyce Van Patten, Celeste Holm and Tim O'Connor

programme.title: Columbo: Short Fuse (1972)
programme.desc: The son of a chemical company's founder is blackmailed by his uncle, who wants to force him into selling the business. The cunning heir responds by murdering his relative with a box of exploding cigars, but finds himself facing the dishevelled detective, who is convinced the resulting fatal detonation was no accident. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Roddy McDowall and Ida Lupino

programme.title: Columbo: Grand Deceptions (1989)
programme.desc: An army colonel who embezzled money from his superior officer to fund arms sales becomes the target of a blackmail attempt when his crimes are discovered. The crooked officer kills the extortionist and makes it look like an accident, but the crumpled cop is soon on his case. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Foxworth and Janet Elber

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: In an effort to protect her job, Rollins makes a deal with the managers of a gambling club - a move that stirs up suspicion among her colleagues. Crime drama, starring Kelli Giddish, Mariska Hargitay, Danny Pino and Ice-T

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate when naval cryptanalyst Andrew Wells is shot dead in a park outside Baltimore. At the scene, Tony spots a man who was one of his informants from 15 years earlier when he was a police officer, but who went into hiding after a bid to bring down the Russian mobsters he worked for went wrong. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team works with Abigail Borin of the Coast Guard Investigative Service after a highly suspicious explosion and fire on board an oil rig kills a US marine corps reservist. Abby detects malware in the platform's computer systems, while Ducky finds traces on the victim's body that lead to a lawyer who works for the oil company. Back in the office, a prankster is bringing some light relief and although the likeliest suspect is Tony, he denies any involvement. Crime drama, guest starring Diane Neal

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A creature is found drowned in wet cement, putting Nick and Hank on the trail of a troll running a protection racket. Meanwhile, Juliette invites Eddie over for dinner to thank him for saving her life. Guest starring David Zayas (Dexter), with David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: When businessman Arthur Jarvis finds himself in financial difficulty, he approaches his wealthy mother-in-law for financial assistance. She refuses, and shortly afterwards is murdered. When Nick and Hank investigate the case, they discover the culprit to be a bat-like monster, and reveal a marriage bearing eerie similarities to the Cinderella story

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to trap a crooked lawyer who bribes his clients - but as he tries to track down the man's accomplice, he realises the investigation has placed his own job on the line. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An answering machine message leads Briscoe and Curtis to reopen an investigation into an arson attack that killed a girl - but the 15-year-old suspect has a powerful ally in his grandfather, an influential force in political spheres. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Robert Vaughn (Hustle) alongside Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Two teens from an underachieving high school are accused of burning to death a student from a more successful charter school. Lupo and Bernard investigate, and soon begin to suspect the boys' principal is providing them with a bogus alibi. Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when a woman is found brutally murdered, and the evidence leads them to a medical school student. Police drama, starring Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate an attack on a nurse, and discover she had been moving house regularly in an effort to evade a stalker who terrorised her with distressing e-mails. The victim regains consciousness, but fails to identify her attacker, leading to the shocking revelation that she may have fabricated the assault story as a way of attracting attention

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the disappearance of a wealthy couple seemingly snatched from their apartment building, but suspicion eventually falls on a man suffering from mental illness - presenting Ross with a tough ethical decision. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Benjamin Bratt and Carey Lowell

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When the body of an elderly woman is found, suspicion turns to her at-home carer and her boyfriend. Evidence quickly begins to suggest the 82-year-old was starved to death, prompting Stone's eye to turn to the victim's granddaughter

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe race to find the kidnapped son of a wealthy businessman who was is arrested while trying to exchange a ransom for the boy, and now threatens to interfere with the investigation

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine major is found dead in an underground maintenance room, having scratched out one of his own eyes - and the presence of a webcam suggests someone watched him die. The team investigates with the help of Lt Col Hollis Mann, and links the case to wanted terrorist Mamoun Sharif, an old adversary who is threatening to unleash a chemical attack

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents try to track down an arms dealer who has the launch codes for the Navy's encrypted satellite defence system and is offering them to the highest bidder. In an attempt to win the confidence of the buyer, Ducky poses as an ageing Englishman trying to sell the information. Guest starring Armand Assante, with David McCallum and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A sailor's body is discovered in a disused restaurant, and his death is initially ascribed to an accidental drug overdose. However, Abby discovers a message written in blood on a laminated card found at the scene and realises he was murdered. Meanwhile, Jimmy continues to pursue a relationship with Agent Michelle Lee

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs' quiet holiday at his remote cabin is interrupted by a surprise visit from Tobias Fornell and Navy Captain Phillip Brooks, as well as a call from NCIS asking for his help locating a robber hiding in the woods near him. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sean Murray star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is forced to take a step back from work when his increasingly frail father Jackson begs him to help track down an old friend from the Second World War who does not have long left to live. Meanwhile, the rest of the team investigate the death of a marine sergeant who appears to have been caught in the crossfire during a bungled robbery, but Tony and Tim find evidence the victim may have been targeted. Crime drama, guest starring Ralph Waite (The Waltons), with Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Petty officer Jody Ray is killed by a hit-and-run driver and evidence points to staff sergeant Justin Dunne, whose guilt seems certain when DiNozzo and McGee find him washing a bloodstained knife when they go to arrest him. However, Dunne tells his lawyer Carrie Clark he was miles away in Falls Church at the time - stabbing bookmaker Donny Sullivan to death. Unable to reveal the truth to the NCIS team, Clark decides to check out the alibi herself. Crime drama, guest starring Salli Richardson-Whitfield (A Town Called Eureka)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A student accuses the star of a reality singing competition of molesting her. Rollins believes the man's case should be handled delicately to avoid damaging his career, but Benson disagrees. As more victims come forward, the suspect is adamant he did not commit the crimes, so the team must devise a new strategy

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Junior officer Amelia Albers is arrested for a drink-driving, but her ripped clothes and other injuries cause the police concern and they call in Benson for advice. A group of soldiers from her unit is suspected of her rape, but the young woman does not want to cooperate with the SVU out of fear that it may ruin her military career

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Hank and Nick investigate an attack on a farmer's horses which puts them on the trail of the legendary Bigfoot

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a Middle Eastern man sends Briscoe and Curtis racing to thwart a suspected terrorist plot to bring destruction to New York - and leads them to uncover a domestic conspiracy involving horrific female circumcision. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy faces bad memories when a drunk driver kills three people - and finds himself forced to protect the perpetrator in the process. Award-winning police drama, starring Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cutter is forced to face the unexpected consequences of his actions when his guilty verdict in a murder trial is set aside. Anna Chlumsky guest stars, with Linus Roache

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murders of four policemen and discover a connection between drug dealers, a jealous husband and a remorseful judge

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Curtis and Briscoe question a disabled boy's bereaved family in an attempt to establish whether his death was a mercy killing or cold-blooded murder, and discover his mother is not as respectable as she makes herself out to be. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A female cop is found stabbed to death in a park alongside a Hispanic male with a near-fatal gunshot wound. Further investigations lead Briscoe and Curtis to a girl who suffered a tough childhood in the care of an abusive father and drug-addicted mother, and her alibi appears to be flimsy at best. Robert Vaughn guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A supposedly dead marine suddenly regains consciousness on the autopsy table, leaving the team struggling to solve the mystery of how he came to be in such a strange predicament. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins helps her friend press charges against her lover, whom she accuses of rape. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Our Queen
programme.desc: Feature-length documentary filmed throughout 2012, providing an in-depth portrait of Elizabeth II during her Diamond Jubilee year. Prince Charles and other members of the royal family share their stories, providing insights into the Queen's life over an important and busy 12 months filled with celebrations. The programme also reveals what really happens when the prime minister sits down with the monarch, and the lid is lifted on that memorable 007 moment at the London Olympic Games opening ceremony

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Black Island (1978)
programme.desc: Two boys become separated from the rest of their class while on a trip to a small island - and end up getting captured by a gang of armed criminals. Adventure, starring Michael Elphick, Martin Murphy and Michael Salmon

programme.title: Time Without Pity (1957)
programme.desc: An alcoholic writer returns home after years living abroad when he learns his estranged son has been convicted of murder and sentenced to hang. Although his attempts at reconciliation are rejected, he spends the last 24 hours before the execution trying to prove his son is innocent by identifying the real killer. Mystery, starring Michael Redgrave, Ann Todd, Leo McKern and Peter Cushing

programme.title: Chinese New Year: Year of the Ox
programme.desc: Bringing together highlights from the capital's past Chinese New Year Celebrations and new and exciting cultural performances to see in the year of the Ox

programme.title: Blind Corner (1964)
programme.desc: A composer's wife learns her husband plans to cut her out of his will, so conspires with her lover to murder him first. Crime drama, starring William Sylvester and Barbara Shelley

programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest (2002)
programme.desc: Two bachelors using the same pseudonym capture the hearts of a couple of girls during a delightful weekend in the countryside. However, their cunning deception leads to all manner of hilarious confusion as the ladies in question attempt to work out who is who. Adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comedy, starring Rupert Everett, Colin Firth, Frances O'Connor, Reese Witherspoon, Judi Dench and Tom Wilkinson

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: Author and entrepreneur Michael Hayman interviews business leaders to discover the secrets of their success

programme.title: A Fine Romance

programme.title: A Fine Romance

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Thirty delegations from around the world arrive to stay at the hotel for the duration of the Olympics, with the red carpet being rolled out five times a day for heads of state. World-famous Danish eatery Noma sets up a pop-up restaurant in the ballroom and Claridge's chefs are faced with providing Nordic-foraged food to thousands of guests who have paid £195 each. A couple fly in from Atlanta for the wedding of their dreams and a butler prepares a suite for one of the hotel's most valued guests, bringing furniture, hat boxes and 20 suits out of storage for just one night

programme.title: Hitler: The Last Ten Days ()
programme.desc: Dramatisation based on eye witness accounts of Hitler's final days in an underground bunker, his military henchmen, and his stormy relationship with Eva Braun

programme.title: Erskineville Kings (1999)
programme.desc: A man who fled his home town to escape his abusive father decides to return once he receives word that the old man is dead. However, he faces a bitter reunion with the brother, who stayed behind to care for their father in his last days, and his ex-girlfriend, whom he abandoned with no explanation. Drama, starring Marty Denniss, Hugh Jackman and Joel Edgerton

programme.title: Absolution (1978)
programme.desc: A humourless priest in a Catholic boys' school falls victim to a practical joke played by his favourite student - with tragic consequences for all concerned. Drama, starring Richard Burton, Dominic Guard, Billy Connolly, Sharon Duce and Andrew Keir

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: Military drama following life for a group of SAS recruits, starring Ross Kemp

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Michael tries to get Joe Pesci to star in his proposed new film Bongo in the Congo, but receives an unenthusiastic response. The lives, loves and laundry of the famous stars living in leafy Surbiton, as performed by impressionists John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: All You Need Is Love

programme.desc: Rupert Everett explores the changes in gay life in the 50 years since the decriminalisation of male homosexuality in England and Wales in 1967. programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: The story of San Francisco 49ers' 1988 Super Bowl success over Cincinnati Bengals at the Joe Robbie Stadium in Miami, Florida. This game is remembered for the 49ers' winning drive in the last few minutes of the game when, trailing 16-13 and with the ball on their own eight-yard line, quarterback Joe Montana led his team down the field and threw the winning touchdown pass with seconds to spare
